instruction: 帮我把技术路线图信息整理到文档里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '功能'
ws['B1'] = '优先级'
ws['C1'] = '计划版本'
ws['D1'] = '预计工时(天)'
ws['A2'] = 'AI智能推荐'
ws['B2'] = 'P0'
ws['C2'] = 'v4.0'
ws['D2'] = 45
ws['A3'] = '多语言支持'
ws['B3'] = 'P1'
ws['C3'] = 'v4.1'
ws['D3'] = 30
ws['A4'] = '离线模式'
ws['B4'] = 'P1'
ws['C4'] = 'v4.1'
ws['D4'] = 25
ws['A5'] = '自定义仪表盘'
ws['B5'] = 'P2'
ws['C5'] = 'v4.2'
ws['D5'] = 20
ws['A6'] = 'API扩展接口'
ws['B6'] = 'P0'
ws['C6'] = 'v4.0'
ws['D6'] = 35
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/tech_roadmap.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把技术路线图信息整理到文档里
从/home/user/Desktop/tech_roadmap.xlsx中统计v4.0版本P0功能数量及合计工时（45+35），追加到/home/user/Desktop/roadmap_note.txt末尾：'v4.0核心功能：2项P0需求，合计工时80天'，保存

include: v4.0核心功能：2项P0需求，合计工时80天
